statement.en: Performance Evaluation of Fluorescent Labeling and Super-Resolution Imaging Methodologies in Haloarchaea
statement.summary: Fluorescence imaging in halophilic archaea is technically challenging due to high-salt conditions, presence of S-layer and small cellular dimensions, which all limit signal detection and structural

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom describes empirical methodology (fluorescent labeling + super-resolution imaging in haloarchaea) currently under active development. The abstract is truncated and describes technical challenges rather than resolved claims. Classification as FLOWING reflects: (1) preprint status (2026 date suggests future/provisional work), (2) incomplete abstract preventing full evaluation, (3) active research frontier where protocols are being refined, not yet canonical.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 塩の濃度が増すほど、光の信号は螺旋状に減衰していく。
